[2018-03-05 11:23] steel0229e (Steel): I'd also like to point out that actual games are not played in base set but base +8 units or even more. Even a single unit added to the pool can change the game drastically in terms of timings. If you add more units, the complexity and interactions increase a billion times. It is good to know how base set works on a theoretical level, but that is not going to matter at all when you play a normal game of Prismata. The random set beats base set, and the random set changes with every game. So calling the game imbalanced just because a lot of effort went into forming the theory that p2 wins base set is ignorant, to say the least, especially if you never played the game.
